calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-26-2009 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-26-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Michael S. Rossoff, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Harlan A. See, who was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendants Missy Bianco or Bonnie Smith.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on January 7, 2009.

Plaintiff introduces the following documentary evidence:

Exhibit 1---Contract for the Rental of Residential Property dated 11/18/04-----------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2---Three Notice to Cure or Quit with POS attached dated 12/04/08------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 3---Proof of Service of the 3-Day Notice
to Pay Rent or Quit dated 12/10/08---------------------------------------ID/EVID.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Harlan A. See, and against defendants Missy Bianco and Bonnie Smith as follows:

Rent & Per Diem Damages - $2,464.00.
Attorney's Fees - $520.00.
Costs - Waived, for a total judgment in the amount of $2,984.00.

Additionally, plaintiff Harlan A. See is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 109 Guerreo Street, San Francisco, CA. The rental agreement is canceled and the lease agreement is forfeited.

Counsel stipulates to the return of the Exhibits.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-22-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF harlan see, represented by michael s. rossoff, esq. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT IN COURT.

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR DUE TO NON APPEARANCE OF THE DEFENDANT. TRIAL DATE REMAINS. JURY TRIAL IS NOT STRICKEN.

COMMISSIONER william gargano, CLERK LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED (218).
